polyline.points: [% with_variable( 'p', json_to_array( file_contents( 'https://www.northgeorgiaebikes.com/data/profiles/FS_42.json' ) ), array_to_string( array_foreach( @p, scale_linear( map_get(@element,'d'), 0, array_max(array_foreach(@p,map_get(@element,'d'))), 0, 100 ) || ',' || ( 80 - scale_linear( map_get(@element,'e'), array_min(array_foreach(@p,map_get(@element,'e'))), array_max(array_foreach(@p,map_get(@element,'e'))), 0, 80 )) ), ' ' ) ) %]
